T0148.title: Quick Scam
T0148.definition: A type of scam that is quick, low-cost, and high-yield. This is in contrast to "elaborate grooming" scams, which require more time to develop scripts and storylines to defraud victims by gaining their affection or trust over a longer period.
T0148.description: A type of scam that is quick, low-cost, and high-yield. This is in contrast to "elaborate grooming" scams, which require more time to develop scripts and storylines to defraud victims by gaining their affection or trust over a longer period.
T0148.usageExample: 他们组专做快餐，一天能撒出去上万条招嫖广告，有人上钩就发码收款，根本不废话。
